title: Plants vs Zombies: Reimagined
description: What makes this Plants vs Zombies mod different from other PvZ mods is that I made the plants into usable items/weapons/armor to make Minecraft's combat more interesting. As well as added new zombies based on zombies from the PvZ franchise.
body:
Plants vs Zombies: Reimagined (A Minecraft Forge Mod)


- What this mod specifically does or add?

This is a Plants vs Zombies mod, it's different from other PvZ mods because I made the plants into usable items, weapons, and armor, rather than mobs. As well as added over a dozen new zombies inspired by various zombies from the PvZ franchise.

- Why someone would want to download the project?

If you are a fan of PvZ and want to spice up your experience with Minecraft's combat, this would be a fun mod to play with.

- Is there any other critical information the user must know before downloading?

Yes. The mod right now is for 1.19.4 w/ Minecraft Forge. 
For more details of the individual plants, zombies, and other features. I go in depth on the changelogs for the different versions. And I have an in-depth showcase video for v1.0 of the mod.


Showcase Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4VTGhD1zoJU

Showcase Video (Egypt): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NpE6eyXJtcw

Showcase Video (Pirate Seas): https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vb922Un5ezY
